articles.title: Allu Arjun likely to shift to Mumbai for 'Raaka's' long and intense shoot
articles.description: Raaka movie: Allu Arjun may move to Mumbai for a long, demanding Raaka shoot, reducing travel from Hyderabad. The Atlee directorial stars Deepika Padukone, with rumours of Shah Rukh Khan cameo, and is targeting a 2027 release. Production remains on track as per reports

articles.title: 'Monumental setback' for Modi's foreign policy: Congress on Pakistan's role in US-Iran peace moves
articles.description: US-Iran talks: Congress attacks Modi government as Pakistan hosts key negotiations, calling it a setback for India’s foreign policy. Jairam Ramesh cites Asim Munir’s US outreach, questions India’s diplomatic strategy amid regional tensions.

articles.title: Top 10 Unsolved Mysteries in the World That Continue to Baffle Scientists
articles.description: From the Bermuda Triangle to the Wow! Signal, explore 10 unsolved mysteries that continue to puzzle scientists. These strange events and ancient secrets remain unexplained despite years of research.

articles.title: Promised American dream jobs that never...: How an Indian-origin duo ran a fake H-1B visa scheme for 2.5 years
articles.description: H-1B visa fraud: Sampath Rajidi and Sreedhar Mada, both 51 and residents of Dublin in California's East Bay, pleaded guilty this week on charges of conspiracy to commit H-1B visa fraud

articles.title: ‘Americans Can't Afford Trump Presidency’: Why Republicans Are A Worried Lot Ahead Of November Midterms
articles.description: US Energy Secretary Chris Wright on Sunday warned that it might not be until 2027 before US gas prices come back under $3 a gallon.

articles.title: I Tried This Made-in-India Tablet That Can Work Like A Laptop And Here’s My Take
articles.description: Available at a starting price of Rs 34,999 in India, the Brave Ark tries to offer a laptop-like experience, but it still feels like a work in progress.

articles.title: Anand Mahindra’s Monday motivation is a nonagenarian who proves you can change your life’s script any day
articles.description: Anand Mahindra Monday Motivation: Anand Mahindra has highlighted the inspiring journey of Prabhavati Bhagwati, a 98-year-old entrepreneur from Ahmedabad, who started her home-based venture “Nani’s Nashta” after personal loss. Her story of resilience and late-life entrepreneurship, built on traditional Gujarati food and word-of-mouth success, is now motivating people across generations to believe that it’s never too late to start anew.

articles.title: Sadhguru’s Yogic Approach To Weight Loss Focuses On Balance, Not Restriction
articles.description: Sadhguru shares a yogic approach to weight loss using millets, plant-based foods, mindful eating and proper meal gaps for sustainable health.

articles.title: TMC vs Himanta Biswa Sarma Erupts As Mamata Banerjee Row Sparks Election Commission Complaint
articles.description: A political clash has intensified in West Bengal after Trinamool Congress filed a complaint against Assam Chief Minister Himanta Biswa Sarma over alleged divisive remarks. The party accused him of communal statements and violating the model code, while Sarma hit back with allegations of infiltration. The controversy has heightened tensions ahead of elections, drawing attention to the Election Commission’s next move.

articles.title: Pune: Akola, Wardha touch 45°C as state reels under heat
articles.description: According to data from the IMD, Akola, Wardha have emerged among the hottest locations in the state; each recording a maximum temperature of 45 degrees Celsius.

articles.title: No-fly zone for PM, Soren misses event
articles.description: Jhargram: Jharkhand CM Hemant Soren's helicopter was unable to land in Lalgarh on Sunday due to a \"no-fly zone\" established for PM Narendra Modi's ral.

articles.title: Will induct all I-PAC staffers in TMC, none will lose job: Mamata
articles.description: Kolkata: CM Mamata Banerjee on Sunday pledged to induct I-PAC personnel into Trinamool and ensure no one loses their job as she lashed out against BJP.

articles.title: In Kol, CAPF chiefs take stock of poll security in mega meet
articles.description: Kolkata: In a first-of-its-kind exercise in a poll-bound state, the chiefs of all Central Armed Police Forces (CAPFs) held a high-level meeting in Kol.

articles.title: Stock of fake weight loss drug worth Rs 56 L seized from cab in Gurgaon, key accused managed production from home
articles.description: On Sunday, police in Gurgaon said spurious Mounjaro injections — used for diabetes management and weight loss — valued at over Rs 56 lakh were recovered from a car.

articles.title: 'My bat is the prize': Shreyas Iyer reveals dressing-room contest
articles.description: Punjab Kings secured a dominant 54-run victory over Lucknow Super Giants, propelling them to the top of the table. Captain Shreyas Iyer revealed a light-hearted six-hitting contest in the dressing room fueled the team's batting prowess, with Priyansh Arya and Cooper Connolly smashing centuries to post a season-high 254/7.

articles.title: IDF confirms viral image of soldier destroying Jesus statue in Lebanon, vows action
articles.description: An Israeli soldier was filmed destroying a Jesus statue in southern Lebanon. The Israeli military confirmed the image's authenticity. They stated the soldier's actions were serious and did not align with their values. An investigation is underway, and disciplinary action will follow. The IDF is also working to help restore the damaged statue.

articles.title: PM Modi steps up attack on TMC in Bengal rally blitz, says BJP will form govt
articles.description: Addressing rallies in Purulia, Bankura, Jhargram, and West Midnapore’s Belda, Modi said the BJP will come to power in the state after the two-phase elections.

articles.title: Is Fernando Mendoza single? Expected No. 1 pick in the 2026 NFL Draft makes it clear
articles.description: Fernando Mendoza is set to go No. 1 overall in the 2026 NFL Draft, with the Las Vegas Raiders widely expected to select him. His early involvement in the team’s offensive system suggests strong internal confidence in his role. While draft night approaches, Mendoza remains grounded, opting for a quiet celebration in Florida and maintaining a distraction-free routine. His focus and preparation have positioned him as a franchise-ready quarterback even before his name is officially called.

articles.title: Iran warns Strait of Hormuz security has a cost amid US tensions
articles.description: Iran's VP warns that security in the Strait of Hormuz isn't free, linking it to unrestricted Iranian oil exports. The warning follows the US seizure of an Iranian vessel, with Tehran vowing retaliation for the 'maritime piracy'.

articles.title: Annamalai urges votes for EPS, recalls Jayalalithaa's Srirangam win
articles.description: BJP leader K Annamalai campaigned in Tiruchirappalli, urging the public to vote for the NDA alliance and make Edappadi K. Palaniswami the Chief Minister again. EPS is contesting from his stronghold, Edappadi constituency.

articles.description: Mangaluru: An accused who evaded court proceedings for nearly four years was arrested by Mangaluru City police. The individual was wanted in multiple .

articles.title: Inside the Arrest of an 'Iran Arms Broker' Shamim Mafi: $100K Cars, Millions in Ammo
articles.description: Shamim Mafi, a 44-year-old Iranian businesswoman and US green card holder from Woodland Hills, California, was arrested at Los Angeles International Airport on Saturday night and charged with brokering the sale of Iranian-made drones, bombs and millions of rounds of ammunition to Sudan.

articles.title: RAM shortage pushes Apple's Mac Studio to October, MacBook Pro to 2027
articles.description: Apple's highly anticipated M5 Mac Studio and touchscreen MacBook Pro face significant delays, pushed to October and early 2027 respectively. This crunch stems from a global RAM and SSD shortage, fueled by booming AI data centers. Despite software readiness, Apple is strategically holding back hardware launches to ensure sufficient stock, impacting current Mac Studio availability.

articles.title: After women’s quota bill defeat, CM slams opposition
articles.description: In a passionate address, Bihar Chief Minister Samrat Choudhary expressed his outrage over the opposition's thwarting of the women's reservation bill, deeming it a 'dark stain on democracy.' He accused political adversaries, particularly Congress and RJD, of undermining the progress of women, vowing to hold them accountable at the polls.

articles.description: Hyderabad Police's Operation Octopus 2.0 arrests 52, including 32 bank officials, in a major cyber fraud crackdown across India.

articles.description: AI could be key to India's $30 trillion goal by 2047, but a narrow three-to-five-year window will decide whether it builds its own ecosystem or remains dependent

articles.title: 'Do you eat onions?' PM Modi takes 'Jhalmuri break' during Bengal poll campaign - watch
articles.description: Amidst a high-stakes political campaign in West Bengal, Prime Minister Narendra Modi took a refreshing pause for a jhalmuri snack in Jhargram. He interacted with the vendor, inquiring about the price and confirming his liking for onions with a witty remark. This candid moment unfolded as the Prime Minister intensified his campaign efforts across the state.

articles.title: I-PAC Row Heats Up: TMC Denies Shutdown Buzz, Mamata Vows to Protect Staff Jobs
articles.description: The Trinamool Congress (TMC) has dismissed claims that the Indian Political Action Committee (I-PAC) has ceased operations in West Bengal, labeling these reports as unfounded and a tactic to disrupt their election efforts.
